focus: 1x1 matrix (minimal size) with non-zero value — tests trivial single-circulant extraction and handling of n=1.
4x4 matrix with mixed values along the same cyclic shifts — forces greedy choice between conflicting values on the same shift.
2x2 asymmetric matrix — small even-sized case where diagonal and off-diagonal shifts both non-zero and differ, testing minimal multi-circulant decomposition.
